since_last: 33% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.34%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC +0.37% · Gold +0.71% · Nasdaq100 -1.49%. 33% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.34%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.34%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.87%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -14.08%
cards.body: Leaders: LEU +7.28%, ZS +2.27%, OKTA +2.11%, GEV +2.01%, TLN +1.82%. Laggards: ISRG -14.08%, CRNC -7.47%, PUBM -6.60%, AMAT -6.14%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.73% at $123.6
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.73% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
